lorebook.name: The White Forest
lorebook.description: Glimpse World lorebook for The White Forest — part of The Endless

entries.name: [Location] Glimpse World — The White Forest
entries.content: The White Forest is a Glimpse World that presents as an endless forest of trees with pale white bark. Every tree is exactly the same diameter. Every tree is spaced exactly the same distance from its neighbors in every direction, forming a perfect grid that extends as far as any explorer has traveled. There is no undergrowth. No grass, no shrubs, no fallen branches, no moss. The ground between the trees is bare dark soil. There are no animals, no insects, no birds. The only sound present is whatever the traveler themselves makes. The light filtering through the canopy is even and diffuse regardless of the time any traveler arrived, with no visible sun above the leaves. Nothing in The White Forest has ever moved in the presence of a traveler. Nothing has ever responded. The forest does not feel dangerous. It feels like a space that was prepared and then never used.
